name: ESSENTIAL PROPERTIES REALTY TRUST, INC.
summary: . We are an internally managed real estate company that acquires, owns and manages primarily single-tenant properties that are net leased on a long-term basis to middle-market companies operating service-oriented or experience-based businesses. We have assembled a diversified portfolio using a disciplined strategy that focuses on properties leased to tenants in businesses including, but not limited to: Car washes, Medical and dental services, 4 Early childhood education, Quick service restaurant...
